1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="vd-card__header">Listeforslagsportalen for valet i 2027 er no opna</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (213 characters)

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/annonseregelverket" rel="noopener" target="_blank">listeført av Direktoratet for forvaltning og økonomistyring for statsannonsering</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://valg.mediaflowportal.com/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">her.</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="vd-card__header">Stemmerett og manntall</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (102 characters)

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/for-velgere/stortingsvalget-2025/">Stortingsvalget 2025</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

https://www.valg.no/om-valgdirektoratet/tilskudd-til-informasjonstiltak/

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="vd-card__header">Søke om tilskudd</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Europarådet</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valg/valggjennomforing/">Valgjennomføring</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__list__item"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-list vd-list--type-nav"> <h3 class="vd-list__title">Les mer</h3> <ul class="vd-list__body"> <li class="vd-list__item"> <a class="vd-list__element vd-btn vd-btn--skin-primary vd-btn--siz
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2023-06-16-62" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Valgloven</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Valgdirektoratets mål for 2026</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="vd-list__title">Les mer</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valg/valgene-i-norge/">Vala i Noreg</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__list__item"> <a c
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-list vd-list--type-nav"> <h3 class="vd-list__title">Les mer</h3> <ul class="vd-list__body"> <li class="vd-list__item"> <a class="vd-list__element vd-btn vd-btn--skin-primary vd-btn--siz
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Tilskuddsmottakere 2017 - Valgdirektoratet

https://www.valg.no/om-valgdirektoratet/tilskudd-til-informasjonstiltak/tilskuddsmottaker/tilskuddsmottakere-2019/
Avvik: 83 | Bestått: 90

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valgdirektoratet/tilskudd-til-informasjonstiltak/">Tilskudd til informasjonstiltak</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Sikre val - Valgdirektoratet

https://www.valg.no/om-valg/valggjennomforing/sikre-valg/
Avvik: 89 | Bestått: 92
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (83 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="vd-list__title">Les mer</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valg/valggjennomforing/">Valgjennomføring</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__list__item"

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-list vd-list--type-nav"> <h3 class="vd-list__title">Les mer</h3> <ul class="vd-list__body"> <li class="vd-list__item"> <a class="vd-list__element vd-btn vd-btn--skin-primary vd-btn--siz

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.jobbnorge.no/search?OrderBy=Published&Period=All&employer=1672#1" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Ledige stillinger blir publisert på Jobbnorge.</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valgdirektoratet/om-valgdirektoratet/">Om Valgdirektoratet</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sid
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://lovdata.no/lov/2023-06-16-62/§3-1" rel="noopener" target="_blank">valglovens kapittel 3</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://listeforslag.valg.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">listeforslagsportalen</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://listeforslag.valg.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">elektronisk løsning for listeforslag</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="vd-card__header">Stortingsval</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.stortinget.no/no/Stortinget-og-demokratiet/Valg-og-konstituering/Fullmaktskomiteen/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">valt ein fullmaktskomité</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valg/valggjennomforing/">Valgjennomføring</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__list__item"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/for-velgere/stortingsvalget-2025/">Stortingsvalget 2025</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

https://www.valg.no/for-velgere/stortingsvalget-2025/stemme-pa-institusjon/

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/for-velgere/stortingsvalget-2025/">Stortingsvalget 2025</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Tilskuddsmottakere 2019 - Valgdirektoratet

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valgdirektoratet/tilskudd-til-informasjonstiltak/">Tilskudd til informasjonstiltak</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (3 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 3 pages]
Avvik: 4 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name (×234 across article pages)

<svg><use xlink:href="/Assets/Icons/symbol/icons.svg#chevron-down" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"></use></svg>
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til listeforslagsportalen' (×1 across article pages)

<a href="http://listeforslag.valg.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Gå til listeforslagsportalen</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×5 across article pages)

<a href="http://listeforslag.valg.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Gå til listeforslagsportalen</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1) (×3 across article pages)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://valg.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://valg.no --max-pages 19 --format html
